description: Active minimal cleanup-safety batch for the current agent-acceptance repository.

tasks.title: Cleanup queue points to batch-cleanup-dryrun.json
tasks.command: python -c "import json, pathlib, sys; q=json.loads(pathlib.Path('agent-workqueue/cleanup-dryrun.queue.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); sys.exit(0 if q['items'][0]['task_file']=='scripts/examples/batch-cleanup-dryrun.json' else 1)"

tasks.title: Cleanup queue remains dry-run only
tasks.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; text=Path('agent-workqueue/cleanup-dryrun.queue.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); raise SystemExit(1 if '--apply' in text else 0)"
